 requires d < 0\n  ensures CountPositiveAfterDiv(a, d) == CountNegative(a)\n  decreases |a|\n{\n  if |a| > 0 {\n    CountPosDivNeg(a[..|a|-1], d);\n  }\n}\n\nmethod BePositive(a: seq<int>) returns (d: int)\n  ensures d != 0 ==> -1000 <= d <= 1000\n                      && CountPositiveAfterDiv(a, d) >= CeilHalf(|a|)\n  ensures d == 0 ==> (forall d' :: d' == 0 || CountPositiveAfterDiv(a, d') < else {\n      zcount := zcount + 1;\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n  assert a[..n] == a;\n  var half := (n + 1) / 2;\n  if pcount >= half {\n    d := 1;\n    CountPosDivPos(a, 1);\n  } else if ncount CountPosDivPos(a, d');\n      } else {\n        CountPosDivNeg(a, d');\n      }\n    }\n
